query:
INSERT INTO tracks (
            file_path,
            cover_path,
            title,
            album_id,
            artist_id,
            year,
            liked,
            track_number,
            play_count,
            skip_count,
            total_played_sec,
            last_played_at,
            mime_type
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

         ON CONFLICT (file_path) DO NOTHING;
